verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Precious Lord, wondrous King I worship at your feet I give to you my everything Oh God I stand to sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I always love you Lord I worship you, I honor you I glorify your name And I will always love you Lord My everything, my all in all I offer up to you oh Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To do your will, to please you Lord Is what I want to do I give my life, I lift my hands I worship you my King
